sections.heading: Education
items: Master of Public Policy (MPP), University of Chicago, USA
B.A. in Political Science (Public Administration Division), National Taiwan University

sections.heading: Professional Background
sections.content: Prof. Chan brings more than three decades of frontline television journalism experience to the classroom. Before joining NTU in 2025, she held senior leadership roles at TVBS — one of Taiwan's leading cable news networks — most recently as Deputy General Manager of the News Department. Her career spans editorial direction, documentary production, and public affairs reporting, making her one of Taiwan's most accomplished broadcast journalists.

sections.heading: Selected Professional Experience
items: Deputy General Manager, TVBS News Department (2020–2025)
Producer and Host, Step by Step: Discovering New Taiwan, TVBS (2004–2025)
Director and Senior Editor, TVBS News (various roles, 1993–2020)

sections.heading: Courses Taught
